results.twitter_content: Say hello to DeskTrack, our new SaaS product! Simplify office management and boost productivity. #SaaSInnovation #Efficiency #DeskTrack
results.facebook_content: Very excited to announce the launch of our new SaaS product - DeskTrack! A comprehensive office management tool that will streamline your work life. #OfficeManagement #TimeManagement #Productivity #WorkSmarter #SaaSrevolution
results.linkedin_content: Proud to present our new SaaS innovation, DeskTrack - designed to transform the way your business operates. Boost productivity and efficiency with this smart office management tool. #BusinessTransformation #SaaS #OperationsManagement #ProductivitySystems

data.description: Create a LinkedIn post with text, images, or articles

text.label: Post Text
text.description: Post content (special characters will be automatically escaped)

postAs.label: Post As
postAs.description: Post as yourself or an organization

imageUrl.label: Image URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the image to upload and post

videoUrl.label: Video URL
videoUrl.description: URL of the video to upload and post

imageFile.label: Upload Image from Device
imageFile.description: Upload an image from your device (max 10MB). Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF.

videoFile.label: Upload Video from Device
videoFile.description: Upload a video from your device (max 200MB, 10 min). Supports MP4, MOV.

articleUrl.label: Article URL
articleUrl.description: URL of the article to share (required for ARTICLE posts)

thumbnailUrl.label: Article Thumbnail URL
thumbnailUrl.description: LinkedIn image asset URN for article thumbnail

organizationUrn.label: Organization URN
organizationUrn.description: Organization URN (required when posting as organization)

imageUploadMethod.label: Image Upload Method
imageUploadMethod.description: How to attach the image: from URL or upload from device

videoUploadMethod.label: Video Upload Method
videoUploadMethod.description: How to attach the video: from URL or upload from device

shareMediaCategory.label: Media Type
shareMediaCategory.description: Type of media to include in the post

params.description: Create a LinkedIn post with text, images, or articles

text.label: Post Text
text.description: Post content (special characters will be automatically escaped)

postAs.label: Post As
postAs.description: Post as yourself or an organization

imageUrl.label: Image URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the image to upload and post

videoUrl.label: Video URL
videoUrl.description: URL of the video to upload and post

imageFile.label: Upload Image from Device
imageFile.description: Upload an image from your device (max 10MB). Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF.

videoFile.label: Upload Video from Device
videoFile.description: Upload a video from your device (max 200MB, 10 min). Supports MP4, MOV.

articleUrl.label: Article URL
articleUrl.description: URL of the article to share (required for ARTICLE posts)

thumbnailUrl.label: Article Thumbnail URL
thumbnailUrl.description: LinkedIn image asset URN for article thumbnail

organizationUrn.label: Organization URN
organizationUrn.description: Organization URN (required when posting as organization)

imageUploadMethod.label: Image Upload Method
imageUploadMethod.description: How to attach the image: from URL or upload from device

videoUploadMethod.label: Video Upload Method
videoUploadMethod.description: How to attach the video: from URL or upload from device

shareMediaCategory.label: Media Type
shareMediaCategory.description: Type of media to include in the post
